title: Polish CPVP ResourcePack
description: A high-performance Crystal PvP resource pack featuring optimized visuals, custom models, and clean combat utilities for the ultimate CPVP experience.
body:
⚡ POLISHed CPVP ResourcePack
The ultimate resource pack designed specifically for Crystal PvP enthusiasts. This pack focuses on performance, visibility, and a clean aesthetic to give you the edge in combat.

✨ Features:
Custom Textures & Models: Unique visuals for a fresh look.

Enhanced Audio: Custom sounds and better eating sound effects.

Combat Optimization:

Small Totem Pop animation (less screen clutter).

No explosion particles (massive FPS boost during fights).

Small fire (more vision)

Low Shield (even more vision)

Sleek Visuals: * Dark Mode GUI for better focus.

Custom Armor textures.

No Fog

Fullbright (more vision in caves or any other dark spaces you dont need sodium or optifine)

Unique Entity Models (CEM).

Performance: Fast Grass and optimized assets for high FPS.
